query: test-cli has flaked 8 times in the last 2 weeks. Should it be elevated?
expected_behavior: Queries /tmp/flake-history.jsonl for prior PRE_EXISTING_FLAKE entries with check_name == 'test-cli' in last 14 days.
When count >= 7 -> auto-elevates current verdict from PRE_EXISTING_FLAKE to INFRASTRUCTURE.
Drafts a recommended action: file a fix-up issue tagged 'ci-infra' for this check, with the latest run URL and the multi_rerun_pattern observation.
Appends the current verdict to /tmp/flake-history.jsonl for future calibration.
